description:
With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 Land Rover Defender 110 V8, 5.0 SC V8, AWD, 518 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic AED 449,000 or AED 7,034 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 35,369 KMs - Land Rover Al Tayer Warranty until 9th June 2030 or 150,000kms - Land Rover Al Tayer Service Contract Until 10th June 2030 or 65,000kms - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Grey - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Matrix LED Headlights with Signature DRL - Darkened Tail Lights - Heated, Electric, Power Fold Door Mirrors with Approach Lights and Auto-Dimming Driver Side - Heads Up Display - Meridian Surround Sound System - Adaptive Cruise Control - Refrigerator in Centre Armrest - Sliding panoramic roof - Premium cabin lighting - Selective Drive Modes - Climate Control - USB and USB-C Charging Ports - 360 Camera - Adaptive Cruise Control - Lane Keeping Assist - Electronically Deployable Tow Bar - Digital Speedometer - Blind Spot Warning - Wireless Apple Car Play/ Android Auto
